Jumped into a painting, threw a giant penguin off a cliff, and rode a magic carpet. The camera angles are the real enemy.
Walked into a foggy street, got swarmed by angry villagers with pitchforks, and a giant dog ate me. Beautiful gothic vacation.
Slid down a hill at 50 miles per hour, pinged a weapon, and got absolutely melted by a team with matching skins.
A scientist with a crowbar doesn't speak a single word but somehow saves humanity from alien overlords by throwing toilets at them.
Spent $50 on a shiny virtual hat just to get backstabbed by a French guy in a suit who snorted at me.
Woke up on a beach with nothing but a rock. Spent five hours building a wooden shack, only for a naked man to blow it up with C4 while I slept.
A tiny bug with a nail explores a depressing underground kingdom. I lost all my currency because I forgot where I died.
Escorting the president's daughter is fine until she screams for help while I'm being chased by a guy with a chainsaw.
Accidentally shot a car alarm, and now 300 zombies and a crying witch are sprinting directly at my face.
Running through an abandoned asylum with a camcorder that runs out of batteries every two minutes. I've never been more stressed in my life.
A sociopathic CEO rides a diamond pony while I shoot psychos in the face for a gun that shoots exploding swords.
Spent 40 minutes chasing a giant dinosaur across a forest, only for a bigger, angrier dragon to show up and body-slam us both.
Got shot in the head by a guy in a checkered suit. Survived, walked across a radioactive desert, and took over the strip with an army of robots.
I grind for hours to get a gun with a slightly better perk so I can grind slightly faster. The fashion is incredible though.
Kicked a civilian, stole a car, and ran from the cops in a cartoon town. The greatest driving game of our generation.
